name: Turkish Law MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server from Ansvar Systems providing full-text search across Turkish legislation — statutes, acts, and provisions. Enables AI agents to search and retrieve Turkish legal text for compliance research, legal analysis, and regulatory review workflows.
use_cases: Searching Turkish legislation for compliance research from legal analysis agents
Retrieving specific acts and provisions for Turkish regulatory review agents
Legal research across Turkish statutes from contract analysis agents
Automating regulatory compliance checking against Turkish law from compliance agents
not_for: Case law or court decisions (statute/legislation focus — varies by country coverage)
Legal advice — search tool only; always consult a qualified local legal professional
best_when: An agent needs to search and retrieve Turkish legislation text for compliance analysis, regulatory review, or legal research — accessing statute databases programmatically.
avoid_when: You need Turkish case law beyond statutes, or require formal legal determinations. AI legal research is a starting point — verify with qualified Turkish legal counsel.

auth.notes: No authentication required — accesses public legislation databases.

pricing.notes: Free open source. Public domain legislation data.

known_agent_gotchas: Legal research AI output requires verification by qualified Turkish legal counsel — do not use as final legal authority
Legislation text may be current as of a specific date — check for recent amendments
Ansvar Systems specializes in compliance tooling — consistent implementation across their law MCPs
Turkish privacy law may apply if agent processes personal data alongside legislation queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public legislation data — non-sensitive. No auth required. HTTPS. AI legal analysis requires human expert review before acting on Turkish legal conclusions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public legislation data. No auth. HTTPS. Legal research — validate with counsel.
